config.name: buildkite_ci_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: buildkite_ci_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Entity Management (3004)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:15:23.727020

-- Pre-compile regex patterns for performance
local email_pattern = "^([^@]+)@(.+)$"

-- Cached activity type mappings
local ACTIVITY_TYPES = {
  created = {id = 1, name = "Create", type_uid = 300401},
  added = {id = 1, name = "Create", type_uid = 300401},
  read = {id = 2, name = "Read", type_uid = 300402},
  updated = {id = 3, name = "Update", type_uid = 300403}, 
  changed = {id = 3, name = "Update", type_uid = 300403},
  deleted = {id = 4, name = "Delete", type_uid = 300404},
  destroyed = {id = 4, name = "Delete", type_uid = 300404},
  removed = {id = 4, name = "Delete", type_uid = 300404},
  enabled = {id = 8, name = "Enable", type_uid = 300408},
  disabled = {id = 9, name = "Disable", type_uid = 300409},
  activated = {id = 10, name = "Activate", type_uid = 300410},
  revoked = {id = 12, name = "Suspend", type_uid = 300412}
}

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    if not record.unmapped then
        return nil, "Missing unmapped data"
    end

    -- Initialize output with constant fields
    local output = {
        class_uid = 3004,
        class_name = "Entity Management",
        category_uid = 3, 
        category_name = "Identity & Access Management",
        severity_id = 99,
        event = {},
        actor = {
            user = {}
        },
        src_endpoint = {}
    }

    -- Handle event action and activity type mapping
    local event_type = record.unmapped.type
    if event_type then
        output.event.action = event_type
        
        -- Determine activity type
        local activity = nil
        for pattern, mapping in pairs(ACTIVITY_TYPES) do
            if string.find(event_type, pattern) then
                activity = mapping
                break
            end
        end

        -- Set activity fields
        if activity then
            output.activity_id = activity.id
            output.activity_name = activity.name
            output.type_uid = activity.type_uid
            output.type_name = string.format("Entity Management: %s", activity.name)
        else
            -- Default to Other
            output.activity_id = 99
            output.activity_name = "Other"
            output.type_uid = 300499
            output.type_name = "Entity Management: Other"
        end
    end

    -- Handle actor information
    if record.unmapped.actor then
        local actor = record.unmapped.actor
        
        -- Email processing
        if actor.node and actor.node.email then
            local email = actor.node.email
            output.actor.user.email_addr = email
            
            -- Extract username and domain
            local username, domain = string.match(email, email_pattern)
            if username and domain then
                output.actor.user.name = username
                output.actor.user.domain = domain
            end
        end

        -- Copy other actor fields
        output.actor.user.full_name = actor.name
        output.actor.user.uid = actor.uuid
        output.actor.user.type = actor.type
    end

    -- Handle IP address
    if record.unmapped.context and record.unmapped.context.requestIpAddress then
        output.src_endpoint.ip = record.unmapped.context.requestIpAddress
    end

    -- Handle timestamp
    if record.unmapped.occurredAt then
        local timestamp = record.unmapped.occurredAt
        -- Convert ISO8601 to epoch seconds
        output.time = require("date").parse(timestamp):totime()
    else
        output.time = os.time()
    end

    return output
end
